nasb.text: You shall strike the house of Ahab your master, that I may avenge the blood of My servants the prophets, and the blood of all the servants of the Lord, at the hand of Jezebel.

esv.text: And you shall strike down the house of Ahab your master, so that I may avenge on Jezebel the blood of my servants the prophets, and the blood of all the servants of the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要擊殺你的主人亞哈的家。我要為我僕人眾先知的血和所有耶和華的僕人的血，在耶洗別身上報仇。

ccb.text: 你要杀你主人亚哈的全家，这样我就可以为我的仆人——众先知以及其他仆人报仇，他们被耶洗别杀害。
